title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For October 2023
text: In this series, I rank a selection of Dividend Radar stocks and present the ten top-ranked stocks for further research and possible investment. I screened for high-quality stocks with superior growth and income prospects this month. Additionally, I screened for stocks trading below my risk-adjusted Buy Below prices. Of the 713 Dividend Radar stocks, only 18 survived this month's stringent screens.

title: Earnings Preview: Eversource Energy (ES) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Eversource (ES) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Mantis Innovation is Recognized as a 2023 Eversource Energy Excellence Award Winner
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--In recognition of business partners and their leadership on some of the most innovative projects focused on energy efficiency and electric vehicles (EV) infrastructure, Eversource awarded Mantis Innovation with the Retrofit: Large Business Award as part of the energy company's Eversource Energy Excellence Awards. Mantis Innovation is among seven winners that were chosen from a pool of more than 100 applications. “We are incredibly honored to be recognized with his awar.

title: Eversource Energy to Discuss Third Quarter Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy will webcast a call with analysts on Monday, Nov. 6, 2023, to review financial performance through the third quarter of 2023.

title: Why you can trust the stock market's current ‘buy' signals
text: The stock market, as measured by the S&P 500 Index SPX, has bounced off support, but it remains to be seen if this just an oversold rally or if it is the beginning of a new bullish trend. The support came in two forms: the 4200 level (horizontal blue line on the accompanying SPX chart) and the rising 200-day Moving Average of SPX.
